summary: Large camera-system decompilation PR focused on src/melee/cm. It replaced several camera stubs with C, improved many existing camera functions, updated camera types/prototypes, and introduced Camera_x2D0 as a structured replacement for a run of raw Camera fields. The bot report records 8 new function matches and 20 unmatched-item improvements, alongside one .data regression.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source; added implementations for multiple camera functions, refactored existing camera math/control-flow, added includes, added a static fn_800301D0 prototype, used PAD_STACK and macros such as ABS/MAX/HSD_ASSERTMSG.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: camera.c +1669/-406 in 38 hunks
raw_diff: camera.c include additions and static fn_800301D0 prototype
raw_diff: Camera_8002C1A8, Camera_8002C5B4, Camera_8002C908, Camera_8002E234, Camera_8002E490, Camera_8002EF14, Camera_8002F0E4 implementations
text_corpus: bot report lists all new matches and improvements in main/melee/cm/camera

key_files.role: Type recovery; introduced struct Camera_x2D0 and embedded it into struct Camera at 0x2D0; adjusted field comments and x37C union.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: types.h +23/-16 in 3 hunks
raw_diff: added struct Camera_x2D0 fields y_max/y_min/x_min/x_max/z_max/z_min/angles/unk28/unk2C/callback
raw_diff: replaced Camera fields x2D0..x300 with Camera_x2D0 x2D0

key_files.role: Public prototype cleanup; replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for recovered functions, narrowed signatures, removed public fn_800301D0, and exposed cm_803BCCA0 extern.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: camera.h +6/-6 in 4 hunks
raw_diff: Camera_8002C1A8 void(void), Camera_8002C5B4(Camera_x2D0*), Camera_8002E158(f32*, f32, f32), Camera_800311EC(HSD_GObj*, u64), Camera_80031328(HSD_GObj*, u64)
raw_diff: removed fn_800301D0 from camera.h and added extern CameraUnkGlobals cm_803BCCA0

key_files.role: Forward declaration support for recovered Camera_x2D0 type.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: forward.h +1/-0 in 1 hunk
raw_diff: added typedef struct Camera_x2D0 Camera_x2D0

key_files.role: Static/data declarations changed; cm_80453004 made non-static in .bss area and cm_803BCCA0 initializer was commented out in this slice.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: camera.static.h +10/-9 in 2 hunks
raw_diff: added CameraDebugMode cm_80453004
raw_diff: commented out static CameraUnkGlobals cm_803BCCA0 initializer

what_changed.text: Converted stubs for Camera_8002C1A8, Camera_8002C5B4, Camera_8002C908, Camera_8002E234, Camera_8002E490, Camera_8002EF14, Camera_8002F0E4, and fn_800301D0 into C implementations or substantial partial implementations visible in the diff.

what_changed.text: Improved existing camera functions including Camera_80029CF8, Camera_8002A0C0, Camera_8002B0E0, Camera_8002CB0C, Camera_8002CDDC, Camera_8002D318, Camera_8002D85C, Camera_8002DDC4, Camera_8002F4D4, Camera_8002F9E4, Camera_8002FEEC, Camera_800304E0, Camera_80030E44, Camera_800311EC, Camera_80031328, and Camera_800313E0 according to the bot report.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: 20 improvements in unmatched items

what_changed.text: Recovered Camera_x2D0 as a typed substructure for Camera offset 0x2D0 and updated Camera_8002C5B4 and callback signatures to consume Camera_x2D0*.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h Camera_x2D0 definition
raw_diff: camera.h Camera_8002C5B4(Camera_x2D0*)
raw_diff: callback assignments cast to void (*)(Camera_x2D0*)

what_changed.text: Adjusted source forms toward macros and typed/global field access: used ABS for input deadzone checks, MAX for a frustum-distance select, HSD_ASSERTMSG casts against M_PI_2, direct cm_803BCCA0 field access instead of temporary pointer dereferences, and Camera_x2D0 fields instead of min_distance/max_distance names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_80029CF8 ABS/MAX/HSD_ASSERTMSG and cm_803BCCA0 changes
raw_diff: Camera_8002B0E0 direct cm_803BCCA0 field access
raw_diff: Camera_8002BAA8 x2D0.unk28/unk2C

what_changed.text: The report records text progress but also one .data regression in main/melee/cm/camera.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: matched code +4140 bytes; .data -240 bytes, 75.21% to 37.23%
raw_diff: camera.static.h cm_803BCCA0 initializer commented out

smart_moves.text: Recovered a contiguous camera parameter block as Camera_x2D0 instead of continuing as many flat x2D0..x300 fields, improving call signatures and field grouping.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h Camera_x2D0
raw_diff: Camera_8002C5B4(Camera_x2D0*)

smart_moves.text: Kept uncertain semantics conservative inside the recovered struct by using names such as unk28 and unk2C where the diff does not prove semantic meaning.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_x2D0 has unk28 and unk2C

smart_moves.text: Used project/common macros for simple expressions, e.g. ABS for deadzone comparisons and MAX for the vertical/horizontal frustum distance selection.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ABS in Camera_8002C1A8 and Camera_8002CB0C
raw_diff: MAX in Camera_80029CF8

smart_moves.text: Moved fn_800301D0 out of the public header and made it a static camera.c declaration, matching its local implementation in the slice.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: camera.h removed fn_800301D0 declaration
raw_diff: camera.c added static void fn_800301D0(HSD_GObj*, int)

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a run of adjacent opaque fields is consistently passed around as a parameter block, recover a temporary internal struct and update function signatures rather than keeping flat xNNN fields everywhere.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_x2D0 definition replaces Camera fields x2D0..x300
raw_diff: Camera_8002C5B4 signature changed from void* to Camera_x2D0*

decomp_lessons.lesson: For camera/input decompilation, ordinary source forms such as ABS deadzone tests, MAX clamps, and direct Vec3 helper calls can coexist with matching-oriented local ordering changes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ABS checks around stick/substick values
raw_diff: vert_frustum_dist = MAX(vert_frustum_dist, temp_f28)
raw_diff: lbVector_Add/Sub/Diff/Normalize/RotateAboutUnitAxis use

decomp_lessons.lesson: Prototype cleanup should accompany recovered bodies: replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS and void* arguments when the body establishes a narrower signature.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_8002C1A8 changed to void(void)
raw_diff: Camera_8002C5B4 changed to Camera_x2D0*
raw_diff: Camera_800311EC and Camera_80031328 signatures updated
raw_diff: forward declaration for Camera_x2D0 added

naming_conventions.name: Camera_x2D0
naming_conventions.lesson: Address-offset style type names are appropriate when a structure boundary is recovered but full semantics are not proven.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct Camera_x2D0 Camera_x2D0
raw_diff: struct Camera_x2D0 fields include semantic bounds/angle names plus unk28/unk2C

naming_conventions.name: x2C4 / x2C5 comments
naming_conventions.lesson: Use comments to record limited field meaning when the evidence supports only a partial role, e.g. unk player slot and pauser slot.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: x2C4 comment changed to 'unk player slot'
raw_diff: x2C5 comment changed to 'pauser slot'

naming_conventions.name: fn_800301D0
naming_conventions.lesson: Keep address-style function names for local/static functions when semantic meaning is not established by the PR evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static void fn_800301D0(HSD_GObj*, int)
raw_diff: no semantic rename for fn_800301D0

assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR slice shows PAD_STACK use and matching progress, but it does not include author notes proving each padding site is individually required.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed expression staging and temporary lifetimes to affect codegen, including splitting multiply-by-10 steps, introducing local temporaries for tan(fov) results, and using scoped blocks for Stage_GetCamInfo values.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_8002A0C0 splits var_f31/var_f30 multiply by 10.0f
raw_diff: Camera_80029CF8 tan_fov_u/tan_fov_l temporaries and scoped info_x20/info_x24

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used direct global field access and typed pointer temporaries to shape loads while improving readability.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_8002B0E0 replaces (*new_var2).xE* with cm_803BCCA0.xE*
raw_diff: Camera_8002C908 uses globals = &cm_803BCCA0 then coeff = globals->x84

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Reconstructed retry loops using do/while when repeatedly cycling camera slots until a valid subject/source is found.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_8002C908 do { ... } while (valid == 0)

The raw diff is large and loaded excerpt is truncated, so the postmortem focuses on visible and targeted-read evidence.
The bot report supports match/improvement/regression outcomes, but the slice does not include build logs, objdiff screenshots, author explanations, or rationale for every local matching tactic.
The .data regression is explicitly reported; this intake does not infer whether maintainers accepted that regression as intentional beyond the PR being merged.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover contiguous opaque field ranges as scoped internal structs when signatures expose the grouping
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2387 supports a graph-safe lesson for camera decompilation: a contiguous range of Camera fields at 0x2D0 was replaced by Camera_x2D0, signatures and callbacks were updated to Camera_x2D0*, and remaining uncertain members kept conservative names. This is an example of typed-fields-over-pointer-math and conservative naming rather than proof of final semantic field names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct Camera_x2D0 added
raw_diff: Camera has Camera_x2D0 x2D0 at offset 0x2D0
raw_diff: Camera_8002C5B4(Camera_x2D0*)

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header prototypes should be tightened after body recovery
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2387 updated several camera.h prototypes after recovered bodies, including void(void), typed pointer, and u64 argument signatures, and moved a local helper out of the public header. This is a supported local example of truthful headers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: camera.h prototype diffs
raw_diff: fn_800301D0 removed from camera.h and made static in camera.c
raw_diff: forward.h adds Camera_x2D0 forward typedef

source_update_candidates.title: Require explicit ledger for PAD_STACK-heavy matching PRs
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2387 shows several PAD_STACK insertions in a successful camera matching PR, but the slice lacks per-site rationale. Consider strengthening standards or review checklist text to ask PR authors to identify which PAD_STACK sites are required by objdiff and which are temporary.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: multiple PAD_STACK additions
text_corpus: bot report with text improvements
decomp_standards: matching-tactics-need-evidence
source_update_candidates.reason: The current standards already cover matching tactics; this PR is a useful example for a curator to decide whether a more specific PAD_STACK note or example belongs in the source corpus.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/cm/types.h owns Camera_x2D0 forward-facing type definition
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2387 introduced Camera_x2D0 in src/melee/cm/types.h and added its forward declaration in src/melee/cm/forward.h. If current source still matches this layout, path facts could record that camera type recovery lives in the cm headers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Camera_x2D0 definition
raw_diff: forward.h typedef struct Camera_x2D0 Camera_x2D0
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path ownership fact; needs curator/current-source confirmation before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Investigate cm_803BCCA0 data ownership after PR 2387
source_update_candidates.text: The PR commented out the static cm_803BCCA0 initializer in camera.static.h and added an extern declaration in camera.h, while the bot report shows a .data regression. Curator may want to inspect later history/current source to determine the accepted data ownership resolution.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: cm_803BCCA0 initializer commented out
raw_diff: extern CameraUnkGlobals cm_803BCCA0 added to camera.h
text_corpus: .data regression -240 bytes
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR evidence flags a data regression but does not establish final data ownership or whether the regression was intentionally accepted.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the .data regression as an accepted data-matching tactic; the slice only shows the regression report and changed declarations.
Do not infer full semantic meanings for Camera_x2D0.unk28/unk2C or address-style functions beyond what the diff names.
Do not claim every PAD_STACK site is required; the loaded evidence shows usage plus bot progress, not per-site objdiff proof.
